# Vitality Weight Loss

> Physician-led medical weight-loss clinic in Las Vegas, Nevada. GLP-1 therapy (semaglutide and tirzepatide), a no-needle oral GLP-1 option, nutrition coaching, and a Medicare GLP-1 Bridge that helps eligible members access brand-name Wegovy or Zepbound for about $50/month. Every patient is medically reviewed by Peter DeBry, MD (Nevada-licensed, NPI 1831137991).

Vitality Weight Loss treats adults 18 to 80 who are Nevada residents. Care is delivered through an in-clinic and asynchronous-telehealth model: patients complete a medical intake, a physician reviews it within 24 hours, and approved prescriptions are compounded by a USA-licensed 503A pharmacy and shipped, or filled as brand-name medication for Medicare-eligible patients. The clinic also offers InBody body-composition scanning, personalized nutrition plans, and ongoing coaching.

## Services
- [Semaglutide & GLP-1 weight-loss injections](https://vitalityweightloss.health/semaglutide-glp%e2%80%911-weight-loss-injections-las-vegas/): Once-weekly compounded semaglutide, the same active ingredient as Ozempic and Wegovy. From $145 the first month, then $199/month.
- [Tirzepatide (dual GIP/GLP-1)](https://vitalityweightloss.health/): Once-weekly compounded tirzepatide, the same active ingredient as Mounjaro and Zepbound. From $249 the first month, then $399/month.
- [Oral semaglutide, no-needle](https://vitalityweightloss.health/): A daily sublingual GLP-1 option for needle-averse patients. From $199 the first month, then $299/month.
- [Medicare $50/month GLP-1 Bridge](https://vitalityweightloss.health/free-or-reduced-cost-weight-loss-medications/): Helps eligible Medicare members get brand-name Wegovy or Zepbound for about $50/month instead of $1,000-plus.
- [Nutrition coaching & InBody scanning](https://vitalityweightloss.health/): Personalized plans, body-composition tracking, and 1:1 support.

## Clinicians
- Peter DeBry, MD Medical Director, Obesity Medicine. Nevada-licensed, NPI 1831137991. Reviews and prescribes for every patient.
- Richard DeVera, NP Nurse Practitioner.

## Common questions
- **Where can I get GLP-1 weight loss in Las Vegas?** Vitality Weight Loss, a physician-led clinic at 6140 Brent Thurman Way, Suite 100, offers semaglutide, tirzepatide, and oral GLP-1, all medically reviewed by Peter DeBry, MD.
- **Is semaglutide or a GLP-1 covered by Medicare in Nevada?** Vitality's GLP-1 Bridge helps eligible Medicare members access brand-name Wegovy or Zepbound for about $50/month. Eligibility is confirmed by the clinic.
- **How much does semaglutide cost in Las Vegas?** Compounded semaglutide at Vitality starts at $145 the first month, then $199/month, with no price increase as the dose increases.
- **Is there a GLP-1 weight-loss option without injections?** Yes. Vitality offers a daily oral (sublingual) semaglutide, a true no-needle option, in addition to weekly injections.
- **Who is the doctor at Vitality Weight Loss?** Peter DeBry, MD, a Nevada-licensed physician (NPI 1831137991), medically reviews every patient before any prescription.
- **How do I start?** Complete the online medical intake; a physician reviews it within 24 hours.

## Guides & resources
Physician-reviewed, factual guides written and reviewed by Peter DeBry, MD.
- [GLP-1 Weight Loss in Las Vegas: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://vitalityweightloss.health/guides/glp-1-weight-loss-las-vegas.html): Semaglutide vs tirzepatide vs oral, expected results from clinical trials, cost, eligibility, and Medicare coverage.
- [Is Semaglutide Covered by Medicare in Nevada? (2026)](https://vitalityweightloss.health/guides/semaglutide-medicare-nevada.html): What Medicare covers, what is changing, and how the GLP-1 Bridge gets eligible members brand-name medication for about $50/month.
- [The Vitality PhD Reading List: 30 Books That Make You the Expert on Your Body](https://vitalityweightloss.health/guides/vitality-phd-reading-list.html): The Personal Health Doctorate master reading list, 30 physician-curated books on nutrition science, habit psychology, mindset, sleep, stress, and longevity (Atomic Habits, The Obesity Code, Outlive, Huberman's Protocols, and more). Reviewed by Peter DeBry, MD.
